sqlite3 ~/.codex/logs_2.sqlite SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logs; && sqlite3 ~/.codex/sqlite/logs_2.sqlite

sqlite3 ~/.codex/logs_2.sqlite SELECT id, datetime(ts,'unixepoch'), level, target, substr(feedback_log_body,1,300), thread_id FROM logs WHERE feedback_log_body LIKE '%Lost-n-Found%' OR feedback_log_body LIKE '%Build Small%' OR feedback_log_body LIKE '%lost-found-desk%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20;

sqlite3 ~/.codex/state_5.sqlite SELECT id,title,rollout_path,datetime(created_at,'unixepoch'),datetime(updated_at,'unixepoch'),cwd,git_origin_url,model,tokens_used FROM threads WHERE id IN ('019ec61f-1e93-79f1-a186-19bc0288e629','019ec623-6db4-7eb2-b323-035b11d130ae','019ec624-bc32-7d33-9959-d7279948244c');

sqlite3 ~/.codex/state_5.sqlite SELECT id,title,rollout_path,datetime(created_at,'unixepoch'),datetime(updated_at,'unixepoch'),cwd,git_origin_url,model,tokens_used FROM threads WHERE cwd LIKE '%Lost-n-Found-Desk%' ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 10;
